target: Testmaster platform pricing restructure - 4-tier plan system
summary: ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 16/16 pytest tests passed verifying plan features, prices, and PayPal create-order endpoint. Frontend: All 4 plan tiers display correctly with proper prices. Stage locking, course locking, and Liz button redirect all work for free users.

GET_API_PLAN_FEATURES.evidence: API returns 5 tiers (free, explorer, learner, achiever, master) with correct prices and features

tests: 4 plan cards displayed: Explorer ($4.99), Learner ($9), Achiever ($19), Master ($29)
PRICING_PAGE_UI.evidence: Screenshots confirm all plans visible with correct pricing

tests: Stages 2-8 locked with 'Upgrade to Explorer' overlay
UNIFIED_STAGES_LOCKING.evidence: Free user sees Stage 1 open, others locked; clicking locked stage redirects to pricing

tests: Mastery Course shows 'Upgrade to unlock' for free user
Advanced Mastery shows 'Upgrade to unlock' for free user
DASHBOARD_COURSE_LOCKING.evidence: Dashboard correctly shows locked courses with upgrade prompts

tests: Liz button visible with lock icon for free user
LIZ_FLOATING_BUTTON.evidence: Free user clicking Liz button redirects to pricing page

tests: Modal opens when clicking 'Pay by Bank'
Shows correct plan price ($4.99 for Explorer)
BANK_TRANSFER_MODAL.evidence: Bank transfer modal opens with correct plan info

PAYPAL_CREATE_ORDER.evidence: New plan IDs (explorer, learner, achiever, master) accepted; old plan IDs rejected with 400

tests: Unified stages locking for free user

critical_code_review_comments: Plan access logic in /app/backend/plan_access.py is clean and well-structured
Frontend PricingPage.js correctly displays 4 tiers with dynamic feature lists
UnifiedCoursePage.js correctly implements plan-based stage locking
Dashboard.js correctly shows locked courses with upgrade prompts
LizFloatingButton.js correctly checks ALLOWED_PLANS for access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 63 verified pricing restructure: 4-tier plan system (Explorer $4.99, Learner $9, Achiever $19, Master $29). Free users get Stage 1 only. All other stages/features locked with upgrade prompts. PayPal create-order accepts new plan IDs. Bank transfer modal works. Test user is unverified so email verification modal shows before pricing redirect for locked courses.

mocked_api.note: PayPal SDK renders correctly in production. Bank transfer is fully functional.
